name: Emergency Plumber
description: Connect with 24/7 available plumbing professionals serving your area for rapid emergency response.

name: 24-Hour Plumber
description: Round-the-clock emergency plumbing referral connections for after-hours plumbing emergencies.

name: Burst Pipe Repair
description: Fast leak isolation and burst pipe repairs for underground, in-wall, and ceiling pipework.

name: Blocked Drain Unblocking
description: Professional drain clearing services to unblock sinks, toilets, and main sewer drains.

name: Blocked Toilet Repair
description: Fast assistance to unblock stubborn toilet blockages, overflow issues, and cistern repairs.

name: Drain Repairs
description: Structural drain laying and drain repairs for broken or damaged underground wastewater pipes.

name: CCTV Drain Inspection
description: High-definition camera inspections to locate root intrusions, pipe collapses, and hidden drainage defects.

name: Hydro Jetting
description: High-pressure water jetting to scour grease, tree roots, and heavy debris from blocked sewer lines.

name: Pipe Relining
description: No-dig trenchless pipe repair solution to restore damaged underground pipes without excavating lawns or driveways.

name: Sewer Line Repair
description: Repair broken sewer mains, eliminate root blockages, and restore council-compliant wastewater connections.

name: Stormwater Drain Repair
description: Prevent surface flooding with custom stormwater drainage repairs, cesspits, and soakhole maintenance.

name: Hot Water Cylinder Installation & Replacement
description: Connect with local specialists for electric and gas hot water cylinder installations and replacements.

name: Hot Water Cylinder Repair
description: Repairs for leaking cylinders, thermostat failures, element replacements, and low hot water pressure.

name: No Hot Water Repair
description: Urgent troubleshooting for hot water outages, tripped breakers, valve failures, and cold showers.

name: Gasfitting & Gas Repairs
description: Connect with certificated local gasfitters for gas appliance connections, gas lines, and safety repairs.

name: Gas Leak Detection
description: Urgent gas leak tracing, line isolation, pressure testing, and emergency gas safety repairs.

name: Leaking Tap Repair
description: Fix dripping taps, washer replacements, mixer tap repairs, and new tapware installations.

name: Leaking Pipe Repair
description: Trace and repair concealed water pipe leaks behind walls, under floors, and in ceilings.

name: Toilet Installation & Repair
description: Fix running toilets, unblock cisterns, replace flush valves, and install modern water-saving toilets.

name: Water Leak Detection
description: Acoustic and thermal leak detection to pinpoint hidden water leaks and prevent structural water damage.

name: Water Pressure Repairs
description: Troubleshoot low water pressure and upgrade low-pressure cylinders to high mains pressure systems.

name: Shower Repair
description: Leaking shower mixer repairs, shower rose replacements, and complete shower plumbing installations.

name: Bathroom Plumbing
description: Plumbing rough-ins, vanity installations, bath fitting, and fixture upgrades for bathroom renovations.

name: Kitchen Plumbing
description: Sink installations, mixer tap fitting, dishwasher connections, and kitchen renovation plumbing.

name: Commercial Plumbing
description: Scheduled maintenance, commercial drain clearing, and emergency plumbing for local businesses.

name: Heat Pump Water Heaters
description: Eco-friendly heat pump water heater installations to cut hot water energy consumption in major urban centers.

name: Continuous Flow Gas Hot Water
description: Convert from cylinder water heating to endless continuous flow gas hot water systems.

name: Gas Hob Installation
description: Certificated connection of gas cooktops, freestanding gas stoves, and bayonet gas points.

name: Gas Fireplace Installation
description: Gas log fire servicing, flue repairs, igniter replacements, and safety installations.

name: Backflow Testing
description: Annual commercial backflow prevention testing, IQP certification, and RPZ valve installations.

name: TMV Servicing
description: Thermostatic Mixing Valve (TMV) testing and maintenance for rest homes, schools, and commercial facilities.

name: Grease Traps
description: Commercial kitchen grease trap maintenance, grease converter installations, and sampling point plumbing.

name: Bathroom Renovations
description: Full plumbing rough-ins, vanity installations, and layout alterations for residential bathroom remodels.

name: Gutter and Downpipe Repairs
description: Marley PVC and Colorsteel gutter repairs, spouting unblocking, and downpipe maintenance.

name: Pre-Purchase Plumbing Inspections
description: Comprehensive pre-purchase plumbing checks including pipe materials, cylinder condition, and drainage status.

name: New Build Plumbing
description: Complete new house build plumbing, drainlaying, and gasfitting infrastructure setups.

name: Pipe Thawing
description: Safe electrical pipe thawing for frozen water lines during South Island alpine winters.

name: Freeze Protection
description: Pipe lagging and outdoor water pipe insulation for cold inland and mountain locations.

name: Septic Tanks
description: Rural septic tank plumbing repairs, wastewater system maintenance, and effluent field servicing.

name: Farm Plumbing
description: Stock trough water lines, rural farm plumbing repairs, and shed water supply installations.

name: Submersible Pumps
description: Bore pumps, water tank submersible pumps, and rural water supply pump repair services.

name: Water Tanks
description: Rainwater harvesting tank connections, UV filtration systems, and household water tank pumps.

name: Water Softeners
description: Hard water treatment installations to prevent mineral scale buildup on tapware and cylinders.

name: Underfloor Heating
description: Hydronic in-slab underfloor heating pipe installation, manifold balancing, and pump servicing.

name: Radiator Heating
description: Central heating radiator plumbing, boiler servicing, and system flushing in colder regions.

name: RV / Caravan Plumbing
description: Freshwater tank plumbing, greywater tank fittings, and gas compliance for motorhomes.

name: Solar Hot Water
description: Solar hot water panel collector maintenance, solar cylinder valve replacements, and controller servicing.
